info.name: Partner Portal API
info.description: Full API collection for the Partner Portal Backend. Base URL: {{baseUrl}}. Use the 'Login' request to get a token, then set it as {{token}} in your environment.

request.description: Generates a one-time register token valid for 60 minutes. Copy the registerToken from the response and set it as {{registerToken}}.
Login for all roles. Token is auto-saved to {{token}} collection variable.
One-time endpoint to create the first super admin. Fails if a super admin already exists.
Verifies the JWT and returns the current user's info.
Requires x-register-token header. Roles: customer | vendor | customer_admin | vendor_admin
super_admin → all; customer_admin → customers; vendor_admin → vendors; others → own role.

body.raw:
{
  "itemName": "Organic Wheat Flour",
  "partnerNo": "VNR000001",
  "description": "Premium organic wheat flour, finely milled",
  "itemCategoryCode": "FLOUR",
  "baseUnitOfMeasure": "KG",
  "netWeight": 25.0,
  "grossWeight": 25.5,
  "specifications": "ISO 22000 certified",
  "ingredients": "100% Organic Wheat",
  "allergenDeclaration": "Contains gluten",
  "shelfLifeDays": 365,
  "gtin": "1234567890123",
  "eanCode": "1234567890123",
  "unitPrice": 45.00,
  "priceCurrencyCode": "AED"
}

request.description: Roles: vendor | vendor_admin | super_admin. Syncs to Business Central.

request.description: Only works when item status is 'Created'.
Allowed statuses: Created | Pending | Approved | Rejected. rejectionReason required when status=Rejected.
super_admin only. Only works when item status is 'Created'.
Roles: customer_admin | super_admin. Allowed: Processed | Pending | Approved | Rejected | Cancelled
Roles: vendor | vendor_admin | super_admin. Syncs to Business Central.
Roles: vendor_admin | super_admin. Allowed: Processed | Pending | Approved | Rejected | Cancelled
Roles: vendor_admin | customer_admin | super_admin. Allowed: Pending | Paid | Overdue | Cancelled | Partial
